overall.description: A first-person perspective of someone walking along a narrow dirt path through tall grassland at night, illuminated by a warm artificial light source. The footage shows steady forward movement through an open natural environment with distant trees visible against the dark sky.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path through dense tall grassland at night. The scene is illuminated by a warm artificial light, revealing the winding trail ahead while distant trees form a dark silhouette against the night sky. A leafy bush appears briefly on the left at the start before the path continues through the open prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a narrow dirt path that cuts through a vast, dark grassland under the glow of artificial light. It begins by passing a leafy bush on the left, with the warm illumination carving a visible trail through the dense vegetation. As the camera advances, the path winds further into the open prairie, leaving the initial foliage behind. The scene then expands to reveal the rhythmic sway of tall grass flanking the trail before turning toward the horizon, where distant trees form a stark, dark silhouette against the night sky.
